arts.sum: BBC Sport Italian football expert Mina Rzouki assesses where the Atalanta manager ranks among the best Italian coaches in history.

arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Gasperini: “We Can Qualify for the Playoffs and We Cannot Make Mistakes”
arts.sum: As Atalanta prepare for their crucial Champions League clash against Sturm Graz, head coach Gian Piero Gasperini has emphasized the importance of focusing on the upcoming match after a disappointing defeat to Napoli. The team is set to face the Austrian champions on Tuesday, evening at the Gewiss Stadium. The post Atalanta’s Gasperini: “We Can Qualify for the Playoffs and We Cannot Make Mistakes” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Atalanta and Napoli Vie for Cherki as Lyon Sets Price
arts.sum: Atalanta and Napoli are locked in a battle to secure the services of Rayan Cherki, the talented 21-year-old attacking midfielder from Lyon. Recent reports from Calciomercato suggest that Atalanta are seriously considering making a move for Cherki, with manager Gian Piero Gasperini hinting at the need for offensive reinforcements. The post Atalanta and Napoli Vie for Cherki as Lyon Sets Price appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Atalanta v Sturm Graz: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Champions League resumes after the mid-winter break, Atalanta prepare to host Sturm Graz in a crucial match at the Gewiss Stadium in Bergamo. The Italian side, currently sitting 13th in the league phase with 11 points, aims to secure a spot in the knockout stages, while the Austrian champions, languishing in 29th place with just 3 points, fight to keep their European dreams alive. The post Champions League | Atalanta v Sturm Graz: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.
